indexes.indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_users_force_password_change ON public.users USING btree (force_password_change) WHERE (force_password_change = true)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX notifications_pkey ON public.notifications USING btree (id)

checks.check_clause: ((status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'sent'::character varying, 'delivered'::character varying, 'failed'::character varying, 'bounced'::character varying])::text[]))

indexes.indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_notification_logs_channel ON public.notification_logs USING btree (channel)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX notification_logs_pkey ON public.notification_logs USING btree (id)

checks.check_clause: ((event_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['delivery'::character varying, 'open'::character varying, 'click'::character varying, 'dismiss'::character varying, 'error'::character varying])::text[]))
